description: The Flowserve Durco Mark 3 ISO pump provides outstanding hydraulic performance, unrivalled reliability and low total cost of ownership. It meets ISO 2858 and ISO 5199 design criteria, incorporating a reverse vane impeller for renewable high-efficiency performance.
differentiators: Reverse vane impeller ensures high efficiency and predictable seal chamber pressure
SealSentry seal chamber design extends seal life and provides advanced self-flushing
External micrometer impeller adjustment for fast and accurate clearance setting

description: The Goulds 3196 ANSI Standard Dimension Process Centrifugal Pump features i-FRAME Intelligent Monitoring to extend MTBF and lower life cycle cost. Its trademarked seal chamber designs allow seals to run cooler with better face lubrication for long term, reliable performance.
differentiators: i-FRAME Intelligent Monitoring for early warning of equipment vibration and temperature issues
TaperBore PLUS seal chamber assures efficient heat removal and lubrication
Fully open impeller optimized for handling solids, stringy material, and corrosives

description: AHLSTAR A end-suction single-stage centrifugal process pumps are designed for demanding industrial applications to ensure process reliability, high efficiency, and low operating costs. They offer a versatile range of reliable and efficient impellers.
differentiators: Robust, reliable, and patented Rotokey impeller mounting enables fast dismantling and reassembly
Innovative integrated degassing and self-priming units for difficult liquids
Externally adjustable patented side plate allows simple impeller clearance setting

specifications.application: Demanding industrial, chemical process, heavy duty
specifications.efficiencyFeatures: Patented balancing holes, externally adjustable side plate
